i find it redundant that the chat tells me what it captured, when ui components get's rendered under neath of what was captured

---

I want to build an agent native business operating system. i'm tired of trying to run multiple projects through claude web — everything ends up in one massive chat because starting a new one means losing all context. chat gets huge, gets compacted, and half your decisions evaporate.

You know how it is in a company — decisions get made in Slack threads, meetings, docs, and random conversations — and then six months later nobody remembers why we chose one thing over another, or that one project depends on another project finishing first?

This tool captures all of that automatically. Every decision, task, and dependency gets extracted into a knowledge graph as people talk. So instead of digging through Slack history, you can just ask "what did we decide about the payment flow?" — and it tells you, with the reasoning, who decided it, and what depends on it.

And because the company's entire knowledge base gets updated automatically based on the work that's actually being done, you avoid the classic
